scope.target: Align runtime guidance and workflow notes with the Codex runtime skill wrapper pilot
constraints: Keep the documentation aligned with actual repository state
Do not overstate runtime installation guarantees
non_goals: No migration of additional skills yet

inputs.architecture_target: Make the repo guidance reflect the implemented Codex runtime skill wrapper pilot
user_constraints: Proceed to implementation and keep records under the existing workflow

steps: Updated AI asset location guidance to treat .codex/skills as an existing runtime wrapper layer
Updated local runtime guidance to explain how .codex/prompts and .codex/skills coexist
Updated workflow follow-up notes to reflect the implemented pilot state
validation: Documentation no longer describes .codex/skills as only planned
Prompt wrappers and runtime skill wrappers are explicitly separated
deferred_items: Scale the runtime wrapper model to more skills

results.summary: Aligned documentation and workflow guidance with the implemented Codex runtime wrapper pilot.
